creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 157991
the patch

Hi!

A big bunch of GDAL functionality is in python scripts, not only in binaries. That's why, I think, python should be restored and also enabled by default.

Since GDAL is a kind of scientific software, I'd expect anyone running it already having python on their box, so make dependency footprint shouldn't be a big deal.
